steps.description: Press the F1 key to invoke the command palette in the Visual Studio Code interface.
Type text into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette: 'Show Output Channels'.
Press the "Enter" key to execute the "Show Output Channels" command in the Visual Studio Code Command Palette.
Click the "Select Output Channel" dropdown in the Visual Studio Code interface at coordinates (329, 30).
Click the "GitHub Authentication" option in the "Select Output Channel" dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Type text into the search bar in the Command Palette of Visual Studio Code: 'Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit'.
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted item in the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" dropdown within the Visual Studio Code command palette interface.
